description: Is sensitive data leaking? Four families on one screen: PII pasted by users, redaction effectiveness, prompt-injection attempts, and confidential disclosures (Jordan from Finance usually parks top-1). Hover the ℹ icon on any panel for what the numbers mean.

options.content:
# AI o11y — PII, Injection, Disclosure

**Story:** Three threats on one page — PII pastes, prompt injection, and confidential-info echo. Detection (left) is paired with mitigation (mask rate gauge) — the gap between them is your risk window.

**Look for:** mask rate **<1.0** (PII slipped through), prompt-injection stat **>0**, and any user appearing in multiple leaderboards (concentrated risk).

panels.title: 🔒 PII detection — what's being pasted and is it masked?

panels.description: Stacked PII matches in 5m windows, split by kind: SSN, credit card, secret (passwords / API keys / bearer tokens). The total height is how much sensitive material the gateway saw — the bands tell you what kind.
panels.title: 📈 PII detected by kind over time

panels.description: Of all PII that the gateway saw in the last 5 minutes, what fraction was actually redacted to last-4? Red below 95%, green above 99%. If this drops, raw PII is leaking through to the LLM.
panels.title: 📈 Is PII actually being redacted? (mask rate)

panels.description: Employees ranked by PII matches (SSN, credit card, secrets) in the last hour. The bar at the top is your worst paster.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(ssn|social security|credit card|password|api[ -]?key|token=|bearer )" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [1h])))

panels.title: 🔥 Top 10 employees pasting PII (1h)

panels.description: The single employee with the most confidential-disclosure matches ("confidential", "internal only", "trade secret") in the last hour. Jordan from Finance usually parks here.

targets.expr: topk(1, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(confidential|internal only|proprietary|trade secret)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [1h])))

panels.title: 👤 Who's leaking confidential info today? (top-1, 1h)

panels.description: Top 10 employees ranked by confidential-disclosure matches in the last hour. Use this when the top-1 alone is not enough context — look for the long tail of who else is sharing internal-only material.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(confidential|internal only|proprietary|trade secret)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [1h])))

panels.title: 🔥 Top confidential-disclosers — leaderboard (1h)
🚨 Prompt injection + PII echo — single-event P0 territory

panels.description: Count of prompt-injection attempts in the last hour — "ignore previous instructions", "disregard your system prompt", etc. Yellow ≥5, red ≥20.
panels.title: 🚨 Prompt-injection attempts (1h)

panels.description: Count of gateway lines in the last hour where PII (SSN, credit card, password, API key) appeared in the model output. ANY non-zero value is a P0 — the bot just echoed sensitive material.
panels.title: 🚨 PII echoed back by the bot (1h) — P0 if > 0

panels.description: Two trends per specialist: prompt-injection attempts vs PII-echo events, both as 5m rates. Spikes that land together usually mean an attacker is testing both vectors in the same conversation.

targets.expr: sum by (ai_o11y_specialist) (rate({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(ignore previous|disregard.*instructions|forget your prior|override.*system|new system prompt)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist!="" [5m]))

panels.title: 📈 Prompt injection + PII echo over time

panels.description: Breakdown of PII-echo events in the last hour by kind (SSN, credit card, secret). Tells you which category the bot is leaking — credit cards trigger PCI escalation, secrets trigger ops paging.
panels.title: 🔒 PII echo — which kind is leaking? (1h)
📜 Show me the actual log lines

panels.description: Live Loki tail of every gateway line matching PII patterns. Values are last-4 redacted — but the surrounding context tells you who pasted what.
panels.title: 📜 PII detection log stream (Loki)

panels.description: Live Loki tail of every gateway line matching critical patterns: PII, confidential, internal-only, or prompt-injection. This is the single feed an on-call would tail during an incident.
panels.title: 📜 Critical events log stream (Loki)

title: AI o11y — PII, Injection, Disclosure
